parameters.query:
UPDATE YFConsumer.dbo.consm_barcodebindinfo

OUTPUT inserted.*
WHERE retroid='{{$json.retroid}}';

nodes.name: 判断当前的订单是否属于合并订单1
错误信息：SN查询物料主数据失败2

parameters.query:
select r.retroid, r.retroid_id, j.joborder_number, j.order_number from mes.retroid r JOIN mes.joborder j on r.joborder_id = j.joborder_id 
where r.retroid ={{ $json.snList }} and  r.status !=3

select md.data ->>'uuid' as uuid, md.data ->> 'uuid_unique' as uuid_unique,md.data ->> 'sn' as sn, md.retroid_id  from mes.machine_data md 
where md.retroid_id = {{ $json.retroid_id }}
and md.procedure_detail_id ='39'
order by md.createtime desc
limit 1
